page_content:
Consult the department for eligible courses in each area.

Other Program Requirements:

No course earned with a grade below "C-" will count toward the

certiﬁcate in LGBTQ Studies.

An overall GPA of 2.0 in the certiﬁcate is required for graduation.

Students may use a maximum of nine credits (or three courses) to satisfy the requirements of both their major and the certiﬁcate in LGBTQ Studies.

No more than nine of the required credits may be taken at an institution other than the University of Maryland, College Park.
